acceptance.label: The rewrite preserves repo truth, a single machine-local shared runtime store, and worktree-scoped engines under one machine host, with a backend-neutral shared-runtime store seam that can later take Postgres without another architecture rewrite.

payload.summary: Preserve PRISM's three-plane persistence split as a hard architectural boundary: repo-published truth stays in `.prism`, shared mutable runtime state lives in one machine-local shared runtime database, and each active workspace or worktree gets its own authoritative WorkspaceRuntimeEngine inside one machine-scoped MCP host. The rewrite must keep the shared-runtime store backend-neutral so SQLite remains the local implementation now while Postgres can later replace it to extend the same coordination model across machines without another semantic rewrite.
payload.title: Preserve the three-plane persistence split and the machine-scoped shared runtime host
